data.title: INOVIO to Report First Quarter Financial Results on May 13, 2026
data.description: In Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania, on May 1, 2026, a biotechnology company known as INOVIO (NASDAQ:INO) shared updates. INOVIO is dedicated to creating DNA medicines to combat HPV-related diseases, cancer, and infectious diseases. The company revealed its first quarter performance for 2026.

data.title: Solid Biosciences Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: Solid Biosciences Inc., based in Charlestown, Massachusetts, revealed that they have granted 8,070 restricted stock units (RSUs) to a newly hired employee on May 1, 2026. The company, listed on Nasdaq as SLDB, specializes in developing precision genetic medicines for neuromuscular and cardiac diseases.

data.title: Summary Notice of Proposed Settlement of Derivative Action
data.description: Pegasystems Inc. (NASDAQ: PEGA) based in Waltham, Massachusetts, issued a notice about a proposed settlement regarding derivative actions. The legal case, involving Civil No. 24-1734-BLS1 with plaintiffs John Dwyer and another versus defendants Alan Trefler and others, was consolidated with Civil No. 24-3076-BLS1 with plaintiffs Jayne Birch and another versus defendants Alan Trefler and others. This notice informs about the pending litigation and potential settlement in the Superior Court of Suffolk County, Commonwealth of Massachusetts.

data.title: Fate Therapeutics Reports New Employee Inducement Award Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In San Diego on May 1, 2026, Fate Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: FATE) revealed the granting of 30,200 restricted stock units (RSUs) to a new non-executive employee. These RSUs, representing shares of the company's common stock, were authorized by the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors under the Amended and Restated Inducement Equity Plan. The grant acts as an inducement for the new employee to join the company, aligning with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). The RSUs are set to vest over four years, with 25% of the shares underlying each award vesting annually from the grant date, contingent on the employee's continuous employment with Fate Therapeutics.

data.title: Asana to Announce First Quarter Fiscal Year 2027 Financial Results on Thursday, May 28, 2026
data.description: Asana, Inc. will be reporting its financial results for the first quarter fiscal year 2027 on Thursday, May 28, following the closure of the U.S. markets. The company, listed under NYSE: ASAN and LTSE: ASAN, specializes in a collaborative system for work involving both humans and AI. A webcast is scheduled for the same day at 1:30 p.m. Pacific time (4:30 p.m. Eastern time) to discuss these financial results. The live webcast and replay will be accessible to interested parties.

data.title: TransAct Technologies to Report First Quarter 2026 Results On May 12, 2026, Host Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: TransAct Technologies Inc. (Nasdaq: TACT) based in Hamden, Connecticut, will report its Q1 2026 financial results after the market closes on May 12, 2026. A conference call and webcast will be held at 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day. Participants can join by dialing 877-704-4453 with the conference ID 13760514. It is recommended to call in at least ten minutes before the scheduled time. TransAct Technologies is known for its software-driven technology and printing solutions focusing on high-growth markets.

data.title: Cardlytics Announces Inducement Grant Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In Atlanta, Cardlytics, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDLX) revealed that on April 29, 2026, the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors awarded a total of 272,000 restricted stock units to six new hires. These stock units were given as incentives for joining Cardlytics, as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4), and were distributed under the Cardlytics, Inc. 2022 Inducement Plan.

data.title: Extreme Networks Announces Investor Conferences for May and June 2026
data.description: Extreme Networks, based in Morrisville, North Carolina, revealed its investor conference plans for May and June of 2026.

data.title: Upland Announces Commencement of New CEO Tenure and Inducement Awards
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Upland Software, Inc. (Nasdaq: UPLD), known for AI-powered knowledge and content management software, shared news about Sean Nathaniel starting as the President and CEO. As per his offer letter from February 21, 2026, the Company will provide Sean Nathaniel with two equity awards as part of his compensation package.

data.title: Myomo to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 7
data.description: In Burlington, Massachusetts, Myomo, Inc. (NYSE American: MYO), a company specializing in wearable medical robotics for individuals with neurological disorders and upper-limb paralysis, has disclosed plans to release its first-quarter financial results on May 7, 2026. The report will cover the period ending March 31, 2026. A conference call will be conducted by management at 4:30 p.m. Eastern time on the same day to discuss the results, offer insights into the company's operations, and address any queries.

data.title: International Paper Analysts Slash Their Forecasts Following Q1 Results
data.description: International Paper Co (NYSE: IP) reported its first quarter results, with earnings of 15 cents per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of 14 cents per share. However, quarterly sales fell slightly below expectations at $5.970 billion, missing the estimated $6.014 billion. The company highlighted progress in North America, where commercial actions are driving market outgrowth and improvements in cost-cutting efforts. Additionally, advancements were made in mill and box plant productivity. In the EMEA region, focus continues on accelerating commercial and cost initiatives, with a dedicated team working on the planned separation.

data.title: These Analysts Raise Their Forecasts On T. Rowe Price Following Strong Q1 Earnings
data.description: Investment management firm T Rowe Price Group Inc (NASDAQ: TROW) exceeded expectations with its first-quarter earnings report. The company's earnings per share were $2.52, surpassing the estimated $2.35. However, quarterly sales of $1.857 billion fell slightly short of the expected $1.858 billion. Following the positive earnings, T. Rowe Price's shares increased by 0.6% to reach $103.50 on Friday. Analysts, including Glenn Schorr from Evercore ISI Group, kept their ratings on the stock, with Schorr raising the price target. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Xenon Pharmaceuticals Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: Xenon Pharmaceuticals Inc., a biopharmaceutical company based in Vancouver and Boston, revealed on May 1, 2026, that it has awarded equity grants to seven new non-officer employees. The grants include a total of 25,600 share options and 15,000 restricted share units (RSUs). These grants were approved by the Compensation Committee of the company's Board of Directors on April 30, 2026. The awards were deemed essential inducements for these employees to join the company. This move complies with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Intellia Therapeutics Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On May 1, 2026, Intellia Therapeutics, Inc. in Cambridge, MA, granted inducement awards to 43 newly hired staff under the 2024 Inducement Plan. Intellia, a prominent biopharmaceutical firm utilizing CRISPR gene editing and other key technologies, gave out these awards to attract talent. The company, listed as Nasdaq: NTLA, has made this move to enhance its workforce, emphasizing their commitment to innovation and growth.

data.title: Avalyn Announces Closing of Initial Public Offering and Full Exercise of Underwriters’ Option to Purchase Additional Shares
data.description: A company specializing in inhaled respiratory therapeutics, Avalyn Pharma, recently completed its initial public offering on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol AVLN. The IPO closed at a total of $345 million, with the full overallotment option exercised. This successful offering demonstrates strong investor interest in the clinical-stage pharmaceutical company.

data.title: Thornburg Income Builder Opportunities Trust Announces Distribution
data.description: Santa Fe, New Mexico - As of May 1, 2026, Thornburg Income Builder Opportunities Trust (TBLD) reported a monthly distribution of $0.10417 per share on its common shares. This distribution is set to be paid out on May 20, 2026, to common shareholders who are recorded as of May 11, 2026.

data.title: HighWire Press Partners with the Middle East Institute to Launch Enhanced Digital Platform for The Middle East Journal
data.description: In the bustling city of New York, on May 1, 2026, an enhanced HighWire Hosting platform was launched. This upgraded platform offers users a redesigned interface, improved search and discovery capabilities, seamless Salesforce integration, and analytics that adhere to COUNTER standards. This transformation aims to modernize the access and exploration of over 75 years of esteemed regional academic work, providing a contemporary digital environment for scholarly pursuits.

data.title: ZIEGLER ADVISES THE SALE OF CREST VIEW SENIOR COMMUNITY AT BLAINE
data.description: On May 1, 2026, in Chicago, Ziegler, a specialty investment bank, revealed their exclusive role as the sell-side financial advisor for Crest View Senior Communities (known as "Crest View") in the sale of Crest View Senior Community at Blaine. This community consists of 164 units.

data.title: R.W. Beckett Acquires Wayne Combustion Systems
data.description: On May 1, 2026, in North Ridgeville, Ohio, R.W. Beckett Corporation revealed the acquisition of Wayne Combustion Systems, showcasing their dedication to the combustion sector. This strategic move solidifies Beckett's position in the industry by integrating Wayne's reputable brand and extensive application reach. This acquisition marks a significant step for Beckett as they continue to expand their footprint in the market.
